subcodes.first_line: God, the Lord of the Throne and of the dust beneath, beareth witness, ere the creation of all beings, that there is none other God but Him, the Single, the One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله رب العرش و الثری قبل خلق الوری انه لا اله الا هو الفرد الواحد
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement
